[center]FLASHING COLORS+LIGHTS, BLOOD, VULGAR LANGUAGE.[/center][/spoiler]

[center]

[color=0014fe]audio log 413, starting,, now,
hello, seer, and to all gods to come, my name is nevrex,
after an apperance of a reckless time player of yours, i decided to answer
some of your unimportant questions for me but may provide some vital information to please,
so, i will continue to explain why i given you this opportunity to gather, because
i know you are not one,[/color][/center]

[img]https://file.garden/@mspfa-archive/discord/attachments/777531822694727700/777531870547935252/unknown.png[/img]

[center][color=0014fe]you came for my story so my story you will recieve, but nothing more because it's unimportant,
i am no seer but i do not see why my artibutes of existing and possibly co-existing with you is important, but i will calm your senses,[/color][/center]

[center][color=#0014fe]

i don't remember much of my past, surprisngly enough, holding all of time makes time seem so small, so some of my memories might be misplaced from event to event, please do bare with me,[/color][/center]



[img]https://file.garden/@mspfa-archive/discord/attachments/777531822694727700/777531900675620904/unknown.png[/img]


[center][color=#0014fe]i was 6 sweeps old,[/color][/center]

[img=650x450]https://file.garden/@mspfa-archive/discord/attachments/777531822694727700/777531969516601374/unknown.png[/img]


[center][color=#0014fe]i was on the beach with a lusus who accompanied me, no it was not my real lusus, i'll explain onto that just not now,
i ran from the noise of drones coming for me,[/color][/center]

[img=650x450]https://file.garden/@mspfa-archive/discord/attachments/777531822694727700/777539325738090536/unknown.png[/img]


[center][color=#0014fe]why drones followed me is hard to remember,, 
i guess i will have to start from the real beginning? alright,[/color][/center]

[center][color=#0014fe]me and the lusus liked to sit against the beach side, he enjoyed the water and so did i, it was mutual bonding and at the time i wasn't really in a mentally stable place, so he, although possibly accidental, gave time for me to not lose so much of sanity in me, i'll elaborate onto that later,[/color][/center]


[img]https://file.garden/@mspfa-archive/discord/attachments/777531822694727700/777550463376556072/unknown.png[/img]

[img=650x450]https://file.garden/@mspfa-archive/discord/attachments/777531822694727700/777618386133581876/unknown.png[/img]


[color=#0014fe][center]this was not something unusal for us, we did it on a weekly basis, the only unusal thing about this is that a seadweller overheard our enjoyment of the seaside, something landwellers like i were not accustomed to in their eyes,[/center][/color]

[center][color=#0014fe]our conversation was very awkward,[/color][/center]

[spoiler open="OPEN DIALOGUE" close="HIDE DIALOGUE"]
[color=#886544]WNEOZI: |-| yo-ou like the water.. ? |-|[/color]
[color=#0014fe]NEVREX: WHAT THE FUCK-[/color]
[color=#886544]WNEOZI: |-| o-oh so-orry, i didn't realize i can startle yo-ou.[/color]
[color=#0014fe]NEVREX: well congratulagtions, you have absoluteltly no DECENCY of casual conversation,[/color]
[color=#886544]WNEOZI: |-| i'm so-orry :( |-|[/color]
[color=#0014fe]NEVREX: what do you want, seadweller, and where are your friends?? i ASSUMED if you were to pick on me again you'd have a better background than this.[/color]
[color=#886544]WNEOZI: |-| huh? |-|[/color]
[color=#0014fe]NEVREX: don't act so dumb with me,[/color]
[color=#886544]WNEOZI: |-| i'm no-ot sure i understand.. |-|
WNEOZI: |-| have we met befo-ore..? |-|[/color]
[color=#0014fe]NEVREX: ,, now that you declare that, i must say i do not recognize you,[/color]
[color=#886544]WNEOZI: |-| i'm so-orry yo-ou have mean seadwellers bullying yo-ou.. they bully me to-oo-o so-o i understand ho-ow it feels.[/color]
[color=#0014fe]NEVREX: i don't even know you,
NEVREX: what do you want,[/color][/spoiler]

[spoiler open="OPEN DIALOGUE" close="HIDE DIALOGUE"][color=#886544]WNEOZI: |-| well, i wanted to-o go-o o-out o-of the water fo-or a bit, and seeing yo-ou in the water was weird, i tho-ought landwellers hate the water and want to-o po-ollute it! |-|[/color]
[color=#0014fe]NEVREX: how in what land would that be a good idea???[/color]
[color=#886544]WNEOZI: |-| i do-on't kno-ow, to-o destro-oy the ranking o-of o-ours so-o yo-ou'd be higher? |-|[/color]
[color=#0014fe]NEVREX: that's delusional,[/color]
[color=#886544]WNEOZI: |-| ... |-|[/color]
[color=#0014fe]NEVREX: ,,,
NEVREX: OH,
NEVREX: alright,[/color]

[color=#0014fe]NEVREX: my apologies for the awkward atmosphere i set,[/color]
[color=#886544]WNEOZI: |-| i mean, it was o-off putting,
WNEOZI: |-| fo-or a mo-oment i tho-ought i was wro-ong, :( it was very stressing. |-|
WNEOZI: |-| i mean, bullying sucks! but why wo-ould yo-ou bring yo-ourself to-o hate all seadwellers? it's very clo-ose minded and upsetting,[/color] 
[color=#0014fe]NEVREX: ,,,[/color][/spoiler]

[img=650x450]https://file.garden/@mspfa-archive/discord/attachments/777531822694727700/777618407247446046/unknown.png[/img]

[spoiler open="OPEN DIALOGUE" close="HIDE DIALOGUE"]
[color=#0014fe]NEVREX: they killed my lusus,
NEVREX: and none of them had a hint of remorse,
NEVREX: no regret no NOTHING,
NEVREX: so why would i not assume that all seadwellers are backstabbing fuckers who have nothing but boredom of wealth and PRIVLIDGE,
NEVREX: i don't think you lost your lusus over fucking harrasment now did you,[/color]
[color=#886544]WNEOZI: |-| ... |-|[/color] [/spoiler]

[img=650x450]https://file.garden/@mspfa-archive/discord/attachments/777531822694727700/777642695363264549/unknown.png[/img]


[spoiler open="OPEN DIALOGUE" close="HIDE DIALOGUE"][color=#886544]WNEOZI: |-| .. isn't that one your lusus..? |-|[/color]
[color=#0014fe]NEVREX: you SERIOUSLY have no decency or an advantage to voice a valid and AT LEAST AN APPROPRIATE response to MINE,[/color]
[color=#886544]WNEOZI: |-| so-orry! |-|[/color][/spoiler]

[img=650x450]https://file.garden/@mspfa-archive/discord/attachments/777531822694727700/777618454542155796/unknown.png[/img]

[center][color=#0014fe]he didn't know how to commune well, it's something my young self failed to see, probably because my young self also, did not know how to commune either,


i'll spare the details, we exhanged names, his name's WNEOZI, a bronze blood seadweller, and was a friend, of course after multpule attempts to become one, he was desprate for friendship, he had also an issue with the folk in the water, (that's some way to put it better,) so he found me as a advantage point for friendship since i also struggled,[/color][/center]

[img=650x450]https://file.garden/@mspfa-archive/discord/attachments/777531822694727700/778297435013120040/unknown.png[/img]


[center][color=#0014fe]i, also was probably desprate for friendship other than a lusus i could not understand, so i allowed him to visit me, although never saying he could, he did so anyways,


he visited me enough for me to actually find his presence nice, he was still indecent, still inappropriate but he couldn't help it, so i put it aside as a minor flaw,[/color][/center]

[img=650x450]https://file.garden/@mspfa-archive/discord/attachments/777531822694727700/778297466063159316/unknown.png[/img]


[center][color=#0014fe]that specific day when he left, i felt nice, i felt true and began to see confidence i never thought i'd see within me,

i felt like there is going to be a step forward,


[img=650x450]https://file.garden/@mspfa-archive/discord/attachments/777531822694727700/778307841647443968/unknown.png[/img]


no longer will i stay alone with those who brought me to my knees when someone can hold me up, something that pitiful lusus did not know how to do,[/color][/center]

[center][color=#0014fe][size=15][b]that oblivious thought did not stay for long, i now remember why i was on that beach as drones hunted me down[/b],[/size][/color][/center]


[center][color=#0014fe]as usual, i waited for WNEOZI, but for my dismay, it was not him,[/color][/center]

[center][color=#0014fe]a group of seadwellers, ranking from teal, coblat and indigo, higher then i, came forward and mocked me, it was verbal but there was more antagonizing mocks and wishes to bring pain to me, i stood my ground hoping that WNEOZI will fight by my side,[/color][/center]

[img=650x450]https://file.garden/@mspfa-archive/discord/attachments/777531822694727700/778297540482564106/unknown.png[/img]


[color=#0014fe][center]WNEOZI hid behind them and looked at the other side, not looking at me, and that moment followed to haunt me as my trust fell, i became angry,

but i had no time to think or concentrate over my emotion state as they beat me down,
[/center][/color]
[img=650x450]https://file.garden/@mspfa-archive/discord/attachments/777531822694727700/778297561098223637/unknown.png[/img]

[color=#0014fe][center]they continued to drag my name down the dirt, calling me to fight back and warning me over their ranking, they wanted me to fight them so they can allow the drone to kill me,


before i can act smart i acted brash and over stepped my place.
[/center][/color]

[spoiler open="OPEN DIALOGUE" close="HIDE DIALOGUE"][color=#0014fe]NEVREX: FUCK, YOU, ALL,[/color][/spoiler]


[color=#0014fe][center]i proceeded to slowly fight off and kill them all individually, they might have a high rank but nothing beats down the strength of the standing land, something they overlooked,
[/center][/color]

[img=650x450]https://file.garden/@mspfa-archive/discord/attachments/777531822694727700/778326529176371221/unknown.png[/img]

[img=650x450]https://file.garden/@mspfa-archive/discord/attachments/777531822694727700/778316037170921472/unknown.png[/img]


[center][color=#0014fe]and through the realization of my errors, i was left frozen as blood painted the sand, my body and my hands, WNEOZI swam away in fear during my realization,


i had to run away quickly before the drones find me, they were going to end me in the spot for what i have done, disobey the spectrum,
[/color][/center]

[img=650x450]https://file.garden/@mspfa-archive/discord/attachments/777531822694727700/777531969516601374/unknown.png[/img]

[img=650x450]https://file.garden/@mspfa-archive/discord/attachments/777531822694727700/777539325738090536/unknown.png[/img]

[center][color=#0014fe]me and my old lusus built a hive tree when i was young, and i used it as a rehabilitation station for myself and my mind, to keep me sane from the world around me, it was the only place where i can recognize how overwhelmed i was and relax,[/color][/center]

[img]https://file.garden/@mspfa-archive/discord/attachments/777531822694727700/778326569311666186/unknown.png[/img]


[spoiler open="OPEN DIALOGUE" close="HIDE DIALOGUE"]
[color=#0014fe]NEVREX: dear gog dear gog,,
NEVREX: i'm so sorry please,
NEVREX: please i don't want to die yet,
NEVREX: please please,,[/color][/spoiler]

[center][color=#0014fe]amist my fragile state, i heard a calling,
[/color][/center]

[img]https://file.garden/@mspfa-archive/discord/attachments/777531822694727700/779033086163288065/unknown.png[/img]

[center][background=#000000][color=#000000][size=16]yj prince, yj prince nog gu’ilg lem, cn 'ai gu’ilg jalu,[/size][/color][/background][/center]

[img]https://file.garden/@mspfa-archive/discord/attachments/777531822694727700/779033120120242256/unknown.png[/img]


[center][color=#0014fe]i heard a muddy voice call for me, all i could decipher that it was calling, and a calling for a prince,

i am no prince of any royalty, but i approached by a strange aura, a connection,[/color][/center]


[img]https://file.garden/@mspfa-archive/discord/attachments/777531822694727700/779033162050699284/unknown.png[/img]


[center][color=#0014fe]i don't remember much, all i remember is being clouded by light,[/color][/center]


[img]https://file.garden/@mspfa-archive/discord/attachments/777531822694727700/779035527982481428/4fdR8ymjWqj7loj7.gif[/img]
[img=650x450]https://file.garden/@mspfa-archive/discord/attachments/777531822694727700/779035550060511242/lMV6AxvtHOskTDaE.gif[/img]

[center][color=#0014fe]i woke up with no bruises or blood, nothing on my body, no drone noises,


but i saw something peculiar.[/color][/center]

[img=650x450]https://file.garden/@mspfa-archive/discord/attachments/777531822694727700/780026155965218856/000.png[/img]


[center][color=#0014fe]a scythe or something close to that, laid next to me, for some odd reason i still can't decipher, i somehow knew what it does and how to use it,[/color][/center]


[center][color=#0014fe]this scythe has the power to manipulate time and use time itself easily for whatever the user who holds it wishes for, someone desprate like me didn't know better and used it for selfish reasons that accompany now multipule consquences,[/color][/center]

[img]https://file.garden/@mspfa-archive/discord/attachments/777531822694727700/780026479911632916/P2iSnjfhlR3AUWr0.gif[/img]

[color=#0014fe][center]with time in my hands, everything went wrong,

i created a sea of doomed and null timelines, the alpha timeline cracked into nothing as the universe that was every so expanding paused, i destroyed time,

i killed the universe,[/center][/color]

[img]https://file.garden/@mspfa-archive/discord/attachments/777531822694727700/780034231627153418/ao7Fb4ZUf58GmTm0.gif[/img]

[center]
[color=#0014fe]and that is left is me and the shattered frozen memories of trolls from timelines that were a facade of the main,[/color][/center]

[img]https://file.garden/@mspfa-archive/discord/attachments/777531822694727700/780040041815867402/005.png[/img]


[color=#0014fe][center]nothing but the void around me and the whispers of the scythe reminding me of my errors,[/center][/color]

[img]https://file.garden/@mspfa-archive/discord/attachments/777531822694727700/780040044894748672/006.png[/img]


[center][color=#0014fe]where my only escape would be death, i became timeless and quickly forgot how old i am as sweeps go by,
[/color][/center]

[img]https://file.garden/@mspfa-archive/discord/attachments/777531822694727700/780040967134511104/ImGYj9N1Xy79CguM.gif[/img]


[center][color=#0014fe]after whoever knows how long, i saw it, something strong enough like the alpha timeline, where i and multipule other trolls i could not recognize were playing a game, the concept was silly to me at first, i did not know what it was about, SGRUB,

the scythe whispered to me,
[/color][/center]
[spoiler open="OPEN DIALOGUE" close="HIDE DIALOGUE"]
[color=#e60000]??????: YoU LoUSY IMBECILE, THIS GAME IS IMPoRTANT FoR AN ESCAPE FRoM THIS STUPID voID![/color]
[color=#0014fe]NEVREX: why? this doesn't make sense,,[/color]
[color=#e60000]??????: HAS ANYTHING YoU'vE DoNE MAKE SENSE???[/color]
[color=#0014fe]NEVREX: well yes, in some sense,[/color]
[color=#e60000]??????: No IT HAS NoT!!!! NoW KNoCK IT oFF AND LET ME EXPLAIN To YoU,[/color]
[/spoiler]

[center][color=#0014fe]a universe creating game, this was the perfect opportunity for me to run away from this place, i admit i was desprate and when someone is desprate, they take a coward role, and i am NOT to be blamed for what i did, i did not want to die,

[img]https://file.garden/@mspfa-archive/discord/attachments/777531822694727700/780041472325451816/007.png[/img]

so i killed my alternate self before he reached his place to god tier, and later on killed myself down to where he was meant to be upon,[/color]
[/center]

[img=650x450]https://file.garden/@mspfa-archive/discord/attachments/777531822694727700/779036143429222430/unknown.png[/img]

[center][color=#0014fe]
the PRINCE of SPACE,[/color][/center]

[center][color=#0014fe]i knew being in my god tier would spark their attention more so then before after i killed him, so i came to them after they obtained their victory,[/color][/center]

[img=650x450]https://file.garden/@mspfa-archive/discord/attachments/777531822694727700/780045231135391784/St3YVU9QYKwxRNGO.gif[/img]

[img]https://file.garden/@mspfa-archive/discord/attachments/777531822694727700/779506800297771018/unknown.png[/img]

[color=#0014fe][center]i was quickly rejected, rightfully so, they were going to kill me on the spot for what i've done but they just banished me from their world, they accepted me in the universe steadily if i were to help with a few aspects,

and so i accepted,

but, after sweeps go by and the civilization started to form, they all became weak,[/center][/color]

[img]https://file.garden/@mspfa-archive/discord/attachments/777531822694727700/779506004286898217/unknown.png[/img]

[center][color=#0014fe]the planet, CURRENE, was a life draining rock, it had no core, which is even more odd, the gods died, but personally i think they fled, because i remain alive when i read this, so how is it that they died? nonsensical,

i tried to find multpule ways to have a cure, there was no way to heal this planet with only time in my hand, neither was my god tier useful,

so, i decided to take the extra step,


[/color][/center]

[center][color=#0014fe]i went through space and found it, a planet destroying parasite, the scythe owned knowledge of outer space monstrosities and this was one of them, i asked the parasite for it's power,[/color][/center]


[img]https://file.garden/@mspfa-archive/discord/attachments/588144776126398477/779831393021853706/unknown.png[/img]
[img]https://file.garden/@mspfa-archive/discord/attachments/588144776126398477/779831533723844628/009.png[/img]

[center][color=#0014fe]it seemed pleased by the idea of rest so i invited it,[/color][/center]

[img]https://file.garden/@mspfa-archive/discord/attachments/588144776126398477/779831556046061568/008.png[/img]

[center][color=#0014fe]after delivering the parasite to the empty core of the planet, i watched curiously as it blossomed beauty around it, how rare it is to see generosity, but it is simply an exchange, and an exchange i myself did not partake in and left it to the highest of this future society like mine, now, old

after almost feeling how tired i became and realizing how far time has alterted me, i see it, a vision,

you, seer, i saw you, and from that moment i knew what had to be done, one last doing for the future,[/color][/center]

[img=650x450]https://file.garden/@mspfa-archive/discord/attachments/588144776126398477/779831925342339092/unknown.png[/img]

[img]https://file.garden/@mspfa-archive/discord/attachments/588144776126398477/779831977439395840/wRZd6e42wV1reT86.gif[/img]


[center][color=#0014fe]upon this information, i decided to re-create the SGRUB game, and call it with a new name to remind you of where you stand after reaching beyond, the INFINITY BOX,

be wary, i have not tested this game, but i know how it should function and i already have written down the manual for you, [/color][/center]

[img]https://file.garden/@mspfa-archive/discord/attachments/588144776126398477/779832038592610324/ZDv9gPNpzeNcMpFO.gif[/img]


[center][color=#0014fe]where i will reside should not trouble you, because i myself still have somethings to discover withen myself and my mistakes, i am going to be a universe apart from you all,

may the future speak for you all, my name is nevrex, and i am not your god.
[/color][/center]
[img]https://file.garden/@mspfa-archive/discord/attachments/588144776126398477/779832082666356736/034.png[/img]
